analysis: The project has multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with existing black hole themes. The current theme needs enhancement with bulk animated objects, slides, and page animations. The CSS files have incomplete cosmic animations and the HTML files need more interactive black hole content.

improvements.description: Enhance CSS with bulk animated black hole objects, swirling particle effects, and glowing accretion disk animations using CSS keyframes and transforms.
Add animated black hole slides with auto-rotation, interactive event horizon effects, and parallax scrolling for cosmic depth.
Implement smooth slide transitions, particle system animations, and interactive black hole physics simulations with mouse/touch controls.
